summary: A vertical stylized clip, posted as a repost, with a dark, high-contrast treatment. The sampled frames show a close, pixelated shot of a man's face with the large white word 'NICE' overlaid, then a circular fisheye or peephole view of a masked figure wearing reflective sunglasses with blurred people behind. The clip uses heavy editing and on-screen text.

script.scene: A close, pixelated shot of a man's face on a black background with the white word 'NICE' overlaid.
A circular fisheye or peephole view of a masked figure in reflective sunglasses, with blurred people in the background.
